content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:1-13, SecureField for password) but demo credentials and notes are placeholders: demo_user.txt="test", demo_password.txt="changeme", notes.txt="TBD".
Pierre: Apple's reviewers need working demo credentials and clear steps to reach gated content, otherwise they will reject the app for being untestable. Here all three review_information files contain literal placeholder values ("test", "changeme", "TBD") rather than real account info or navigation guidance. Please replace these with an actual working demo account and notes describing how to sign in and reach core features.
